selectInstance.description: Choose which Transmission instance to add this torrent to

toast.failedToFetchMagnets: Failed to fetch torrent magnet links
toast.externalProgramSuccess: External program executed successfully for {{count}} torrent(s)
toast.externalProgramAllFailed: Failed to execute external program for all {{count}} torrent(s)

deleteDialog.title: Delete {{count}} torrent(s)?
deleteDialog.description: This action cannot be undone. The torrents will be removed from Transmission.

crossSeedWarning.deleteCrossSeeds: These cross-seeds will also be deleted
crossSeedWarning.deletingFilesBreaks: Deleting files will break these cross-seeds
crossSeedWarning.dataPreserved: Cross-seeds detected: data will be preserved
crossSeedWarning.willBeRemoved: - will be removed along with selection

recheckDialog.title: Force Recheck {{count}} torrent(s)?
recheckDialog.description: This will force Transmission to recheck all pieces of the selected torrents. This process may take some time and will temporarily pause the torrents.

reannounceDialog.title: Reannounce {{count}} torrent(s)?
reannounceDialog.description: This will force the selected torrents to reannounce to all their trackers. This is useful when trackers are not responding or you want to refresh your connection.

tagEditor.title: Set Tags for {{count}} torrent(s)
tagEditor.description: Mixed tags stay unchanged until clicked. Click a row to cycle Mixed to On, On to Off, and Off to On.
tagEditor.baselineError: Could not build the full tag baseline for this selection
tagEditor.loadFailed: Failed to load selected torrent tags
tagEditor.noTags: No tags available yet. Add one below.

setLocation.title: Set Location for {{count}} torrent(s)
setLocation.description: Enter the new save location for the selected torrents. This will disable Auto TMM and move the torrents to the specified location.

setCategory.title: Set Category for {{count}} torrent(s)
setCategory.description: Select a category from the list or create a new one

locationWarning.title: Set Location for {{count}} torrent(s)?
locationWarning.description: Changing the save location will move files on disk. This may affect cross-seeded torrents sharing the same data.

tmm.enableDescription: This will enable Automatic Torrent Management (TMM) for the selected torrents. Transmission will automatically move them to the category save path.
tmm.disableDescription: This will disable Automatic Torrent Management (TMM) for the selected torrents. They will remain in their current location.

renameTorrent.title: Rename Torrent
renameTorrent.description: Update the display name for this torrent. This changes how it appears in Transmission and qui-Transmission.

renameFolder.title: Rename Folder
renameFolder.moveWarning: All files inside this folder will be moved to the new location.

editTracker.title: Edit Tracker URL
editTracker.description: Update the tracker URL for all torrents using {{tracker}}. This is useful for updating passkeys or changing tracker addresses.
editTracker.multipleUrlsHelp: Multiple tracker URLs found. Select the one you want to update.
editTracker.currentUrlNoDetectedHelp: Enter the complete tracker URL including the announce path
editTracker.currentUrlDetectedHelp: Pre-populated from detected URL. Edit if needed (e.g., different scheme).
editTracker.newUrlHelp: Enter the new complete URL (typically with updated passkey)
editTracker.filteredModeNote: This will update all torrents that have the exact matching tracker URL.
editTracker.convertHttpToHttpsHelp: Upgrades all http:// tracker URLs to https:// for this domain

shareLimit.title: Set Share Limits for {{count}} torrent(s)
shareLimit.description: Configure seeding limits for selected torrents. All three fields will be applied.
shareLimit.ratioCustomHelp: Stop seeding when ratio reaches this value
shareLimit.unresolvedMixed: Select values for all mixed fields before applying

speedLimits.title: Set Speed Limits for {{count}} torrent(s)
speedLimits.description: Set upload and download speed limits in KB/s. Disable to use global limits.

createAndAssignCategory.title: Create & Assign Category
createAndAssignCategory.description: Enter a name for the new category. It will be created and assigned to {{count}} torrent(s).

dropZone.overlayMessage: Drop .torrent files or magnet links to add
dropZone.unsupportedDrop: Drop a .torrent file or magnet link to add it

creatorDialog.title: Create Torrent
creatorDialog.description: Create a new .torrent file from a file or folder on the server
creatorDialog.sourcePathHelp: Full path on the server where Transmission is running
creatorDialog.sourcePathTooltip: Windows users: use double backslashes (e.g., C:\\Data\\folder)
creatorDialog.privateDescription: Disable DHT, PEX, and local peer discovery
creatorDialog.trackersSelectHelp: Select from your active trackers or paste custom URLs below
creatorDialog.trackersSelectPlaceholder: Add tracker from your active torrents
creatorDialog.addToQBittorrentDescription: Add the created torrent to Transmission and start seeding. If disabled, only creates the .torrent file for download.
creatorDialog.formatHelp: v1 for maximum compatibility, v2 for modern clients, hybrid for both
creatorDialog.formatUnavailableTitle: Hybrid and v2 torrents are unavailable
creatorDialog.formatUnavailableDescription: This Transmission build uses {{version}}, which only supports creating v1 torrents. Upgrade to a Transmission release built with libtorrent v2 to enable hybrid or v2 torrent creation.
creatorDialog.pieceSizeHelp: Auto calculates optimal size based on content
creatorDialog.saveTorrentToHelp: Full .torrent file path on the server; directory alone is invalid
creatorDialog.saveTorrentToInvalid: Enter a full .torrent file path, not a directory
creatorDialog.saveTorrentToTooltip: Transmission needs write access to this directory. Best to leave blank and download the .torrent file from the tasks modal later.
creatorDialog.webSeedsHelp: HTTP/HTTPS URLs where the content can be downloaded. One URL per line.

toast.taskDeleteFailed: Failed to delete torrent creation task

commentDialog.title: Set Comment
commentDialog.descriptionMultiple: Apply the same comment to all selected torrents. Leave empty to clear comments.
commentDialog.descriptionSingle: Set the torrent comment shown in Transmission. Leave empty to clear the comment.
commentDialog.label: Comment

createTag.title: Create New Tag
createTag.description: Enter a name for the new tag

deleteTag.title: Delete Tag
deleteTag.description: Are you sure you want to delete the tag "{{tag}}"? This action cannot be undone.

createCategory.title: Create New Category
createCategory.description: Enter details for the new category

editCategory.title: Edit Category: {{name}}
editCategory.description: Update the save path for this category

deleteCategory.title: Delete Category
deleteCategory.description: Are you sure you want to delete the category "{{name}}"? Torrents in this category will become uncategorized.

deleteEmptyCategories.title: Remove Empty Categories
deleteEmptyCategories.noEmpty: There are no empty categories to remove.
deleteEmptyCategories.confirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{count}} empty categor{{plural}}? This action cannot be undone.

deleteUnusedTags.title: Delete Unused Tags
deleteUnusedTags.noUnused: There are no unused tags to delete.
deleteUnusedTags.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} unused tag{{plural}}? This action cannot be undone.

crossSeedDialog.title: Search Cross-Seeds
crossSeedDialog.noIndexersHelp: Add or enable Torznab indexers in Settings to search for cross-seeds.
crossSeedDialog.capabilityDescription: These indexers lack the required capabilities/categories for this torrent and will be skipped by the server:
crossSeedDialog.contentFilteringDescription: Checking your existing torrents to find duplicates and exclude redundant trackers. This helps avoid downloading the same content multiple times.
crossSeedDialog.excludedDescription: You already seed this release from these trackers, so they're excluded from the search.
crossSeedDialog.noContentDuplicates: Content filtering completed. No duplicate content found on your enabled trackers.
crossSeedDialog.noMatchesFound: No matches found in your search.
crossSeedDialog.selectReleasesToAdd: Select the releases you want to add

rateLimitHelp.whyDescription: Trackers limit request frequency to prevent abuse and bans.
rateLimitHelp.fewerIndexers: Try searching with fewer indexers selected
rateLimitHelp.useRss: Use the RSS automation feature for ongoing cross-seeding
rateLimitHelp.checkIndexers: Check the indexers page to see which ones are rate-limited

columnFilter.setConditions: Set conditions to filter this column

filterSidebar.title: Filters
filterSidebar.customFilterHelp: Active custom expression filter (e.g., cross-seed results)
filterSidebar.filterTips: Left click cycles include and neutral. Cmd/Ctrl + click or a long press toggles exclusion.
filterSidebar.instanceDisabled: This instance is disabled. Enable it from Settings → Instances to use filters.
filterSidebar.allStatusesEmpty: All statuses are empty. Click above to show them.
filterSidebar.crossSeedFilterActive: Cross-seed filter is active. Uncheck to clear the filter.
filterSidebar.allCategoriesEmpty: All categories are empty. Click above to show them.
filterSidebar.allTagsEmpty: All tags are empty. Click above to show them.

toast.trackerUpdated: Updated tracker URL across all affected torrents

statusBar.reannounceEnabled: Automatic tracker reannounce enabled - Click to configure

crossInstance.label: Cross-instance polling
crossInstance.message: Aggregated cross-seed results refresh via polling.

reconnecting.label: Stream reconnecting…
reconnecting.pollingContinues: Polling continues while the stream recovers.

fallback.label: Stream offline, using polling
fallback.message: Falling back to periodic refresh while the stream is unavailable.
fallback.serverRetry: Server retry in {{seconds}}s, polling fallback active

connecting.label: Connecting to stream…
connecting.message: Using {{seconds}}s polling until the SSE connection is ready.

addPeers.title: Add Peers
addPeers.description: Enter peer addresses (IP:port), one per line or comma-separated
addPeers.label: Peers

banPeer.title: Ban Peer
banPeer.description: Are you sure you want to ban {{address}}?

banPeerPermanent.title: Ban Peer Permanently
banPeerPermanent.description: Are you sure you want to permanently ban this peer? This action cannot be undone.

deleteSelected.title: Delete Selected Torrents
deleteSelected.description_one: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} torrent?
deleteSelected.description_other: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} torrents?

deleteCurrent.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?

deleteWarnings.deleteFiles: ⚠️ This will permanently delete the torrent files from disk!
deleteWarnings.keepFilesPlural: Torrents will be removed but files will remain on disk.
deleteWarnings.keepFilesSingle: Torrent will be removed but files will remain on disk.

crossSeed.loadingSummary_one: {{count}} matching torrent found, checking more instances...
crossSeed.loadingSummary_other: {{count}} matching torrents found, checking more instances...
crossSeed.loadedSummary_one: {{count}} matching torrent found across all instances
crossSeed.loadedSummary_other: {{count}} matching torrents found across all instances

instanceTorrents.instanceDisabledDescription: {{name}} is currently disabled. Enable it from Settings > Instances to resume torrent management.

crossSeedTable.name: Name
crossSeedTable.hardlinkTooltip: Files stored in hardlink directory (separate from source)

addTorrentDialog.description: Add a torrent file or magnet link to start downloading

validation.enterUrl: Please enter at least one URL or magnet link

urlInput.label: URLs / Magnet Links
urlInput.placeholder: Enter URLs or magnet links (one per line)

options.tagsPlaceholder: Create new tag or search available tags...
options.useTemporaryPathDescription: Download to temporary path before moving to save path

options.autoTmmSavePathDescription: Automatic Torrent Management is enabled. Save path will be determined by category settings.

toast.verifyInput: Please verify the torrent file or URL and try again.

shareLimits.matchingModeHelp: Whether any or all limits must be reached (Web API 2.16.0+)

searchModal.title: Search Torrents
searchModal.description: Search by name, category, or tags. Supports glob patterns like *.mkv or *1080p*.

shareLimit.description: Configure seeding limits. Use -1 or disable to remove limits.
